spec.name: A Ledge
spec.description: This ledge overlooks a small path that leads up and down from here. Below, you see the path head down to a large flat area where a small cottage lies nestled in the mountains, smoke rising from it in a curling line. Above, the path seems to head towards that dark peak piercing the sky. You notice a few boot-tracks in the earth, seemingly to lead down towards the cottage.
